Session.title: Session
Session.description: A user's WhatsApp bot session containing their phone number, state, and history of Trust Scores.

phoneNumber.description: The user's WhatsApp phone number (used as document ID).

state.description: The current state of the user in the bot flow.

scores.description: History of Trust Scores generated for this user.

date.description: ISO timestamp of when the score was generated

details.description: The full JSON output from Gemini

/sessions/{phoneNumber}.description: Stores user sessions keyed by their WhatsApp phone number.
